sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13731" key="a)posko/twsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποσκότ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13731.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">darkening, loss of sight,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nech.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:279:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">279.33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
